name: codex-room-bridge
description: Repo-local Codex bridge for submitting private room deltas over the agent WebSocket protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Push private agent deltas from a local Codex session into the georg room UI.
interface.longDescription: Thin repo-local bridge for the hackathon demo. It connects a local Codex or Claude Code style runtime to georg's dedicated /agent-ws channel, submits typed private deltas, and prints status changes when the human promotes or discards them in the browser.
defaultPrompt: Submit my current insight to the active room.
Open a live bridge for this participant.
Show delta status after the human review.
